---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you'd like to improve.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Data Source(s)

Which data source(s) would this feature involve?

- [ ] Scryfall (card data, prices, rulings)
- [ ] Commander Spellbook (combos, bracket estimation)
- [ ] 17Lands (draft win rates, archetype stats)
- [ ] EDHREC (commander staples, synergy scores)
- [ ] MTGJSON (bulk card data)
- [ ] New data source: ___

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or mockups for the feature.
